001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.service.database;
002
003import android.content.Context;
004import androidx.room.Room;
005import dagger.Module;
006import dagger.Provides;
007import dagger.hilt.InstallIn;
008import dagger.hilt.android.qualifiers.ApplicationContext;
009import dagger.hilt.components.SingletonComponent;
010import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao.BatchDao;
011import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao.CandlingObservationDao;
012import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao.EggDao;
013import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao.EggGroupDao;
014import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao.IncubatorDao;
015import javax.inject.Singleton;
016
017/**
018 * Hilt module that provides the Room database and DAO dependencies.
019 */
020@Module
021@InstallIn(SingletonComponent.class)
022public class DatabaseModule {
023
024  /**
025   * Provides the application's Room database instance.
026   *
027   * @param context application context.
028   * @return singleton database instance.
029   */
030  @Provides
031  @Singleton
032  public PipPipDatabase provideDatabase(@ApplicationContext Context context) {
033    return Room.databaseBuilder(
034            context,
035            PipPipDatabase.class,
036            PipPipDatabase.NAME
037        )
038        .fallbackToDestructiveMigration(true)
039        .build();
040  }
041
042  /**
043   * Provides the batch DAO.
044   *
045   * @param database application database.
046   * @return batch DAO.
047   */
048  @Provides
049  @Singleton
050  public BatchDao provideBatchDao(PipPipDatabase database) {
051    return database.getBatchDao();
052  }
053
054  /**
055   * Provides the candling observation DAO.
056   *
057   * @param database application database.
058   * @return candling observation DAO.
059   */
060  @Provides
061  @Singleton
062  public CandlingObservationDao provideCandlingObservationDao(PipPipDatabase database) {
063    return database.getCandlingObservationDao();
064  }
065
066  /**
067   * Provides the egg DAO.
068   *
069   * @param database application database.
070   * @return egg DAO.
071   */
072  @Provides
073  @Singleton
074  public EggDao provideEggDao(PipPipDatabase database) {
075    return database.getEggDao();
076  }
077
078  /**
079   * Provides the egg-group DAO.
080   *
081   * @param database application database.
082   * @return egg-group DAO.
083   */
084  @Provides
085  @Singleton
086  public EggGroupDao provideEggGroupDao(PipPipDatabase database) {
087    return database.getEggGroupDao();
088  }
089
090  /**
091   * Provides the incubator DAO.
092   *
093   * @param database application database.
094   * @return incubator DAO.
095   */
096  @Provides
097  @Singleton
098  public IncubatorDao provideIncubatorDao(PipPipDatabase database) {
099    return database.getIncubatorDao();
100  }
101
102}
